noServerDescription: Add a RabbitMQ server connection to monitor channels.
selectServerPrompt: Please select a RabbitMQ server to view channels.
noActiveChannelsDesc: There are currently no active channels on this RabbitMQ server.
filterByState: Click to filter by this state
stateIdleTooltip: No recent activity — may indicate a stale or disconnected consumer.
stateFlowTooltip: Channel is being throttled by the broker due to memory or disk pressure.
stateBlockedTooltip: Channel is blocked — check broker memory and disk alarms.
